products.name: Mirage
products.subtitle: Ethereal Desert Breeze
products.description: Mirage captures the essence of a hidden sanctuary. It's a scent that blurs the lines between reality and dream, offering a refreshing yet mysterious aura that evolves beautifully throughout the day.

products.name: Manha
products.subtitle: Fresh Floral Elegance
products.description: Manha is a delicate expression of femininity. It opens with bright, uplifting floral notes before settling into a soft, memorable embrace. Perfect for daytime wear and elegant evenings.

products.name: Shadow
products.subtitle: Dark Woody Mystery
products.description: Shadow brings an alluring depth to your presence. Complex, woody, and intensely magnetic, it is crafted for those who leave a powerful, lingering impression.

products.name: Odyessy
products.subtitle: Bold Citrus Adventure
products.description: A vibrant burst of energy. Odyessy combines zesty citrus with dynamic aromatic undertones, making it the perfect companion for the confident and the adventurous.
